'''zashaya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:igovomab|igovomab]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-sh-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:igovomab|igovomab]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zashaya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæshæyæth|zæshæyæth]] || [[word:zæshæyæj|zæshæyæj]] || [[word:zæshæyæsh|zæshæyæsh]] || [[word:zæshæyæ|zæshæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zashashayath|zashashayath]] || [[word:zashashayaj|zashashayaj]] || [[word:zashashayash|zashashayash]] || [[word:zashashaya|zashashaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zashayath|zashayath]] || [[word:zashayaj|zashayaj]] || [[word:zashayash|zashayash]] || [[word:zashaya|zashaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zashafyath|zashafyath]] || [[word:zashafyaj|zashafyaj]] || [[word:zashafyash|zashafyash]] || [[word:zashafyaf|zashafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zashayatha|zashayatha]] || [[word:zashayaja|zashayaja]] || [[word:zashayasha|zashayasha]] || [[word:zashayaka|zashayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zashayath|zashayath]] || [[word:zashayaj|zashayaj]] || [[word:zashayash|zashayash]] || [[word:zashaya|zashaya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zashayathal|zashayathal]] || [[word:zashayajal|zashayajal]] || [[word:zashayashal|zashayashal]] || [[word:zashayakal|zashayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zashayathatha|zashayathatha]] || [[word:zashayajaja|zashayajaja]] || [[word:zashayashasha|zashayashasha]] || [[word:zashayaka|zashayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zashayathan|zashayathan]] || [[word:zashayajan|zashayajan]] || [[word:zashayashan|zashayashan]] || [[word:zashayakan|zashayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zashayathaoro|zashayathaoro]] || [[word:zashayajaoro|zashayajaoro]] || [[word:zashayashaoro|zashayashaoro]] || [[word:zashayakaoro|zashayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
